template_library.name: Data Processing & ETL Templates
template_library.description: Comprehensive collection of enterprise-grade data processing and ETL workflow templates

templates.name: Cross-Database Synchronization & Replication
templates.description: Real-time data replication between different database systems with conflict resolution

templates.name: Multi-Source API Data Aggregation Pipeline
templates.description: Collect and combine data from multiple REST APIs with rate limiting and caching

templates.name: Enterprise CSV Batch Processing Pipeline
templates.description: High-performance CSV processing with validation and quality reporting

templates.name: Real-Time Data Streaming & Processing Pipeline
templates.description: High-throughput streaming pipeline with Apache Kafka and real-time analytics

templates.name: Enterprise Data Warehouse ETL Pipeline
templates.description: Comprehensive ETL with dimensional modeling and slowly changing dimensions

templates.name: Advanced JSON Data Processing Pipeline
templates.description: Complex JSON processing with schema inference and nested data flattening

templates.name: Comprehensive Data Quality Monitoring & Alerting
templates.description: Enterprise data quality monitoring with anomaly detection and intelligent alerting

templates.name: Real-Time Webhook Data Processing Pipeline
templates.description: High-performance webhook processing with validation and intelligent routing

database_operations.name: Database Operations & Synchronization
database_operations.description: Database synchronization, replication, and ETL operations

api_integration.name: API Data Integration
api_integration.description: REST API data collection and webhook processing

data_quality.name: Data Quality & Monitoring
data_quality.description: Data quality assurance and monitoring systems

error_handling.description: Comprehensive error recovery and retry mechanisms

logging_auditing.description: Detailed execution logs and audit trails

prerequisites: Set up messaging systems (Kafka, Redis) if needed
Prepare input data sources and access credentials
setup_steps: Select appropriate template based on use case
Configure connection credentials and environment variables
Customize processing rules and validation logic
Test with sample data to validate configuration
Optimize performance based on monitoring data

support.documentation: Each template includes comprehensive setup guides and troubleshooting information
support.use_case_examples: Templates include real-world use cases and configuration examples
support.performance_guidelines: Optimization recommendations provided for high-volume scenarios
support.troubleshooting: Common issues and resolution steps documented per template
